name: Patient A
history: Longstanding difficult interactions with the patient's mother. Strained communication and delayed sharing of significant events within the family.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must avoid conflict to keep the peace.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am not capable of handling my emotions.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of confrontation and compliance with others' demands.
situation: Disagreement with mother about weekend plans and financial assistance. The mother covers expenses during the visit.
auto_thought: I can't say no to her; I have no control.
behavior: Compliance with mother's wishes despite personal disagreement.
